title: Finite Active-Set Quadratic Program Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite active-set QP bad free-gradient, inactive-slack, and degenerate-multiplier QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact active-set replay computes inactive lower-bound slack 1 for the active-face candidate, free-coordinate stationarity error 2 for the malformed active-face candidate, and degenerate active-bound replay computes stationarity error 1 for a false positive multiplier.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional active-set rows only when they add distinct working-set pivots, equality-constrained solves, cycling guards, or convergence pressure; keep general active-set method theory in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite active-set QP witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay unconstrained minimizers, active-face candidates, degenerate active bounds, constraint slacks, KKT multipliers, stationarity residuals, and free-coordinate errors over exact rationals.
Route false free-gradient, inactive-slack, and degenerate-multiplier claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact slack or stationarity error.
Keep general active-set finite termination, cycling, degeneracy, and convergence claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
